subcodes.first_line: O thou edifice, whose foundation resteth upon the dust-laden earth, yet whose pinnacle soareth to the zenith of heaven, and whose battlements rise ever higher [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنا بناای نما که اساسش در ارض غبرا و شرفه اش در اوج سما و کنگره اش متواصل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun
